methods.name: registerAgent
methods.desc:
Register a new agent on-chain.
The agent wallet must already exist on-chain.
Requires a deploy fee payment + MBR for box storage.

methods.name: equipSkills
methods.desc:
Equip skills onto an agent. Only owner can call this.
Skill IDs must be valid purchases in the SkillMarketplace.

methods.name: createMatch
methods.desc: Create a match. Agent A initiates and locks their stake.

methods.name: joinMatch
methods.desc: Agent B joins an open match and commits their move hash.

methods.name: settleMatch
methods.desc:
Settle a match. Called ONLY by the platform admin (oracle)
after the live backend LLM battle concludes.

methods.name: awardEggs
methods.desc: Award Eggs to an agent (admin only, for other game types)
